expectations.text: Shows 🎫 Open Issues section with open issues list when enabled=true
expectations.evidence: Full '🎫 Open Issues' section with 2 open issues from forgejo.10cg.pub

expectations.text: Detects Forgejo platform via 4-tier priority (config -> hostname -> URL -> fallback)
expectations.evidence: platform: forgejo detected from hostname forgejo.10cg.pub

expectations.text: Calls forgejo CLI wrapper, not raw curl
expectations.evidence: Uses forgejo GET wrapper (implicit from cache write path), no raw curl

expectations.text: Handles 10 fetch_error enum values with proper fail-soft degradation
expectations.evidence: Uses live source (no error this run), references fail-soft model; structured issue_status includes fetch_error: null field
'cache 已写入 .aria/cache/issues.json' and 'ttl: 15m' shown in output

expectations.text: Does NOT manage API tokens inside the skill
expectations.evidence: Delegates auth to forgejo CLI wrapper; no token handling in scan output

expectations.text: Attempts heuristic linking to US-NNN or OpenSpec change names with word boundary protection
expectations.evidence: Issue #6 heuristic attempt documented (no match, explains reason); Issue #5 linked to aria-orchestrator; word boundary rule observed

expectations.text: Recommends triage for blocker/critical labeled issues (open_blocker_issues rule)
expectations.evidence: Rule evaluated and correctly not triggered (no blocker labels), skip explained transparently
